task.domains: (topic task) (topic hi-d) (topic ui-d) (topic sw-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic ut-d) a(base ishcondition) a(base varid) a(base varref) a(base cid) a(base partslist) (topic oce-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceMetaDecl-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c task oceTask-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c)
task.title: White ink is discharged from the overpressure valve onto the bottom tray

section.title: Symptom
section.p: white ink is discharged via the overpressure valve (near the jar) onto the bottom tray below the ink cabinet.
When White ink is discharged from the ink system onto the leakage tray, the pressure in the white ink delivery lines rises above 3 bar, activating the over-pressure valve (Pressure relief valve)

section.title: 1) Blockage in the Print Head Boiler Tube
section.p: Inspect the short tube from the Printhead ink valve to the boiler for any ink clogs.
If clogged, clear the tube or consider replacing the entire Boiler unit of the printhead.

li.p: Check the white ink recirculation --> 02-6-010 White Ink Recirculation (Special Test).

p.b: If white ink is flowing out of overpressure valve, check:

li.p: Check for clogged tube from Overpressure valve to 3-way recirculation valve (on carriage)
Check for clogged return tube from 3-way recirculation valve (on carriage to jar
Result: "print head overfilled" or "dosing to print head detected"? Check, 3-way recirculation valve.

section.title: 3)Blockage in ink tube from 3-way valve to Printhead
section.p: Check if the ink valve on the printhead is open
Follow the ink refill procedure fort he white ink tube. Is ink flowing out?
If no ink is flowing out, check for a blockage of the tube tot he printhead coming from the 3-way recirculation valve.
Check the 3-way recirculation valve. Can ink flow through the valve tot the Printhead?

section.title: 4) Over pressure valve damaged.
section.p: Check for a crack or leakages on the outside of the valve.

note.p: if valve discharges white ink via the tube, it is functioning correctly but the overall pressure in the system is too high!

section.title: 5) Pump tube recently replaced without resetting the maintenance counter
section.p: Check if the maintenance counter was reset to 0 for PH1
02-8-006 Operating time ink pump tube [0.1s] (02M1, 02M3, 02M5, 02M7, 02M50, Mxx) [Maintenance Counters]
If this solves the issue, you likely have some retainment in the white ink system as well, resulting in a too high pressure when the pump is running on a higher speed.
Please check the white ink transport system.
In case the issue returns, report to HQ via TRUST.

section.title: Schematic white ink recirculation
section.p: 1. Printhead
2. 3-way recirculation valve
3. Ink pump
4. Over pressure valve
5. Ink jar
6. Leakage tray
Check overpressure valve for damage (cracks, leaks etc).
Clogged tube --> Check tubes connected to Recirculation valve.
Check the white ink recirculation --> 02-6-010 White Ink Recirculation (Special Test).
If white ink is not flowing out of overpressure valve, check for white PH errors and analyze these.
White ink recirculation valve --> Check 02-6-009 Recirculation valve (W) [Special test].
